prompts.text: "Sequence" — we follow the numbers in order: 1, 2, 3... Each number tells us where to go next.
Count aloud as they connect: "From 1 to 2, from 2 to 3..." — this builds number order and sequencing.
Early on, ask: "What shape do you think it's going to make? Can you guess yet?"
After completing, ask: "How many dots were there? How many lines did you draw?"
